schemaNote: Illustrative lab dashboard spec - not an official Azure/Sentinel workbook schema. Tiles map to named queries in COST_MONITORING_QUERIES.kql.

dashboard.title: Sentinel Cost & Ingestion Dashboard (Lab, Illustrative)
dashboard.description: Illustrative cost-monitoring dashboard for the offline Azure Identity Threat Detection & SOAR lab. Tiles reference the queries in COST_MONITORING_QUERIES.kql. All thresholds and figures are illustrative (AUD, GST-exclusive) and must be tuned to a real workspace before use.

dataSource.note: Read-only ingestion-volume analysis over the Log Analytics Usage table. Quantity is in MBytes; GB = Quantity / 1024.

thresholds.note: Illustrative per-table 30-day totals; alert if any single table dominates unexpectedly.

tiles.title: Workspace ingestion by day (30d)
tiles.queryName: 2. Ingestion by day (workspace total, last 30 days)

thresholds.note: Illustrative workspace totals from INGESTION_BUDGET.md; hard threshold also governed by the daily cap.

tiles.title: Ingestion by day, per table (14d)
tiles.queryName: 3. Ingestion by day, per table (last 14 days)

thresholds.note: No fixed threshold; used to attribute a total-volume spike to a specific table.

tiles.title: Top noisy tables (7d, share of total)
tiles.queryName: 4. Top noisy tables (last 7 days, ranked, with share of total)

thresholds.note: Flag any single table taking an outsized share of workspace volume; cross-check with the coverage tile.

tiles.title: Daily spike vs 7-day average
tiles.queryName: 5. Daily spike detector (yesterday vs trailing 7-day average)

thresholds.note: Fires when yesterday's ingestion is >25% above the trailing 7-day average.

tiles.title: Per-table budget breaches (yesterday)
tiles.queryName: 6. Per-table budget breach (yesterday vs illustrative hard thresholds)

thresholds.note: Mirrors the Hard (alert) column in INGESTION_BUDGET.md; any breached row is an alert.

tiles.title: Unexpected new tables (3d)
tiles.queryName: 7. Unexpected new tables (appeared in last 3d, absent in prior 30d)

thresholds.note: A new table without a budget line means a connector was enabled without governance.

tiles.title: Volume without detection coverage (7d)
tiles.queryName: 8. Tables with volume but (illustratively) no detection coverage

thresholds.note: Ingestion you pay for but no analytics rule reads - candidate to filter, tier down, or drop.
Confirms how much ingested volume is actually charged.
Attributes cost to solutions/connectors rather than raw tables.

tiles.title: Illustrative monthly cost by table (AUD)
tiles.queryName: 11. Cost investigation starting point - illustrative monthly A$ estimate

thresholds.note: Planning estimate only - NOT a bill. Use Azure Cost Management for real charges.

tiles.title: Approaching daily cap (today, running)
tiles.queryName: 12. Approaching the daily cap (running total for the current UTC day)

thresholds.note: Illustrative production cap 30 GB/day (lab cap 1 GB/day); warn at 80% of cap.

budgetAlerts.note: Azure Budget is the financial backstop; the KQL tiles above are the data backstop. Figures are illustrative AUD.
